category_sources: Official Gimmecert docs describe it as a CLI for issuing X.509 certificates with a local CA hierarchy.
source_facts.description says it issues X.509 server and client certificates using a locally generated CA.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gimmecert; official docs title and prose use Gimmecert.
docs_sources: Official Gimmecert Read the Docs page is a dedicated documentation site with contents for about, installation, usage, development, and release notes.
repo_sources: Official Gimmecert development docs instruct cloning the git repository from https://code.majic.rs/gimmecert/.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official docs describe a simple CLI tool and development docs show a Python project workflow.
source_facts.description identifies X.509 certificate and local CA functionality.
source_facts.executables lists gimmecert as a command-line executable.
